canonical_name: Someone came at him out of the dark
One of the men in the room
No man in all of Britain
a fair-haired little boy, clutching a wooden painted knight in his hand
the one who would one day be King
the murderer of the one brother I loved, the one kinsman-
a man she had never known
the gentle Gareth who had been like a son to Arthur
the country beyond the world's end
all the old Companions of the Round Table
all the kings and knights of her day
the boat that would bring them to the island
a barge draped in black, with a dark figure at the prow
the little Gwenhwyfar who had been lessoned here when she was a child
a single one of his knights
the church where Galahad had died
the Northmen who were the new foe
a few of the renegade Northmen
a land that ran red with blood, where sons were not content to await their crowning day
